title: World-Class Speakers
description: Learn from 50+ leading AI researchers and practitioners from across Africa and around the globe. Get insights from experts at Google, Microsoft, DeepMind, and top African universities.

title: Hands-On Workshops
description: Participate in 10+ practical workshops covering deep learning, NLP, computer vision, and AI deployment. Gain skills you can immediately apply to your projects.

title: Networking Opportunities
description: Connect with 500+ attendees from 20+ countries. Build lasting relationships with researchers, students, entrepreneurs, and industry professionals in African AI.

title: Research Presentations
description: Discover cutting-edge AI research from African scholars. Present your own work and get feedback from peers. 30+ technical paper presentations across multiple tracks.

title: Startup & Career Expo
description: Explore opportunities at Africa's leading AI startups and tech companies. Attend the pitch competition with $20,000 in prizes. Access exclusive job postings.

title: Certificate of Attendance
description: Receive an official IndabaX Kenya certificate to showcase your participation in Africa's premier AI conference. Enhance your professional profile.
